name: yrdsl
description: Edit your yrdsl.app sales from Claude Desktop. Add items from product URLs or photos (including photos you paste right into chat), attach/delete/reorder images, publish, mark things reserved. Every response includes a shareable link.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Starts with yrs_live_. Create one at https://app.yrdsl.app/connect. One token covers all your sales.

tools.name: list_sales
tools.description: List all your sales

tools.name: create_sale
tools.description: Create a new sale

tools.name: get_site
tools.description: Read sale metadata (name, theme, contact, etc.)

tools.name: update_site
tools.description: Update sale metadata

tools.name: list_items
tools.description: List items in the sale

tools.name: recent_items
tools.description: List the N most-recently-added items

tools.name: find_item
tools.description: Find items by substring in title, tags, or description

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Read one item's full details

tools.name: draft_item_from_url
tools.description: Turn a product URL into a draft item (title, description, price, image)

tools.name: add_item
tools.description: Add a new item

tools.name: attach_image_from_url
tools.description: Attach an image to an item by URL (server-side fetch)

tools.name: attach_image_from_path
tools.description: Attach an image by local file path. Best for real photos on Claude Code; fails on Claude.ai sandbox paths.

tools.name: attach_image_bytes
tools.description: Attach an image by raw base64 bytes. Truncated by Claude Desktop/web for non-tiny images — prefer attach_image_from_path or the web editor.

tools.name: delete_image
tools.description: Remove a specific photo from an item (keeps the item).

tools.name: update_item
tools.description: Update an existing item

tools.name: delete_item
tools.description: Delete an item

tools.name: mark_reserved
tools.description: Mark an item reserved for a buyer

tools.name: unreserve
tools.description: Clear the reservation on an item

tools.name: publish
tools.description: Publish the sale so buyers can see it

tools.name: unpublish
tools.description: Revert the sale to draft
